description: No visible Report-issue path on pilot UI at start of QA. Per prompt this would have been a release blocker.

description: Pilot UI is read-only. Save and compare functionality from Maine route is not on the pilot route.
recommended_fix: Optional: add save/compare to pilot UI in a future polish sprint after release. Not blocking deploy because pilot copy does not promise these features and existing P99 save-compare validator still PASSES against Maine.

description: Release audit document not yet written. P99-MICRO-PILOT-RELEASE-AUDIT-1 must walk the noindex release checklist before any deploy.
User has not typed push or equivalent affirmation. Per Shelly global preferences push only happens with explicit instruction.

description: launch.json + Maine generated.json + Maine generated.ts have been modified-but-not-staged since before this work began. They are unrelated to pilot but block a clean deploy commit if not addressed.
recommended_fix: Either git restore them OR commit them under a separate cleanup commit. Do NOT mix into pilot commit. Already isolated from this QA commit.

description: Pilot cards show tag-shaped caveats not verbatim source quotes. Users click Official source link to read verbatim text. This is per the bridge contract (raw source quotes stay internal).
recommended_fix: Acceptable for noindex micro-pilot. Future polish could surface short verbatim excerpts in a designed citation panel; out of scope for QA.

description: QA was Playwright headless plus curl plus visual inspection of screenshots. A real human Chrome session has not been performed.
recommended_fix: Recommend a real user Chrome session at release-audit stage as a final spot-check.
